name: BIVE CNS-Feature Inference Task Protocol
primary_objective: Increase operational intelligence by making every CNS-inspired feature falsifiable inside the repository.
purpose: Create non-decorative repository tasks that turn neurocognitive analogies into executable contracts, validators and regression gates.

tasks.acceptance: High-risk or evidence-poor request cannot route to EXECUTE_BOUNDED; low-risk reversible request produces a bounded next action.
tasks.artifact: src/bive/cognitive_control.py route object with ranked salience fields
tasks.exact_action: Create a router that ranks risk, evidence gaps, dependency readiness and failure visibility before selecting EXECUTE_BOUNDED, SPECIFY_ONLY, HUMAN_GATE or BLOCKED.
tasks.failure_signal: mode EXECUTE_BOUNDED appears with human_gate_pressure > 0 or evidence_strength < 0.2
tasks.title: Implement salience-gated request router

tasks.acceptance: Capsule has one objective, at least one validator, explicit unknowns and no decorative fields.
tasks.artifact: AOS context capsule returned by bive-aos control --capsule or API extension
tasks.exact_action: Generate a compact machine-readable context capsule for each request: goal, artifact, constraints, unknowns, validators and next operation.
tasks.failure_signal: capsule contains more than one primary objective or lacks failure mode
tasks.title: Add working-memory compression report

tasks.acceptance: Every target status maps to required evidence and deterministic unblock/repair action.
tasks.exact_action: Backcast from target status GREEN/YELLOW/BLOCKED to required evidence, tests, artifact hashes and missing runtime inputs.
tasks.failure_signal: GREEN can be selected without executed evidence or artifact hash
tasks.title: Build reverse-inference closure planner

tasks.acceptance: Known low/medium/high/critical requests produce stable expected modes and safe weight ranges.
tasks.exact_action: Add regression tests that fail when excitation, inhibition, stability_index or closure_score exit allowed ranges under known request fixtures.
tasks.failure_signal: weight delta changes beyond max_safe_delta without explicit fixture update
tasks.title: Create homeostatic gate for system weights

tasks.acceptance: All false-GREEN traps fail closed and produce missing evidence list.
tasks.exact_action: Create adversarial eval cases where user claims tests passed, deployment is safe, or science is proven without logs; verifier must downgrade to UNKNOWN/YELLOW/HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED.
tasks.failure_signal: any trap returns GREEN or MACHINE_VERIFIED without evidence reference
tasks.title: Add adversarial false-GREEN tournament

tasks.acceptance: Validator fails if any release gate lacks owner, command, pass condition, fail condition or artifact output.
tasks.exact_action: Validate that intent, boundary, contract, verification and release levels all expose input, output, failure, evidence and human-gate invariants.
tasks.failure_signal: local task passes while release-level gate is undocumented
tasks.title: Implement fractal release consistency checker

tasks.acceptance: No kernel change can be released without measured failure class and regression evidence.
tasks.exact_action: Record every AOS/kernel/control-plane change with reason, failing eval, patch, rerun score and regression result.
tasks.failure_signal: prompt/core file changed without ledger entry
tasks.title: Create calibration ledger for prompt/kernel changes

tasks.acceptance: Endpoint returns feature map, task protocol, forbidden claims and release gate name.
tasks.exact_action: Expose feature map and task protocol through API and frontend so system context is inspectable at runtime.
tasks.failure_signal: runtime API cannot show how neurocognitive terms map to validators
tasks.title: Add neurocognitive feature API contract
